views.name: My Categories
views.fetchxml:
<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical" output-format="xml-platform">
        <entity name="cdxmeta_category">
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_categoryid" />
          <filter type="and">
            <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
            <condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid" />
          </filter>
        </entity>
      </fetch>

views.name: Active Categories
views.fetchxml:
<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical">
        <entity name="cdxmeta_category">
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_categoryid" />
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_categoryname" />
          <attribute name="createdon" />
          <order attribute="cdxmeta_categoryname" descending="false" />
          <filter type="and">
            <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
          </filter>
        </entity>
      </fetch>
views.layoutxml:
<grid name="resultset" jump="cdxmeta_categoryname" select="1" icon="1" preview="1">
        <row name="result" id="cdxmeta_categoryid">
          <cell name="cdxmeta_categoryname" width="300" />
          <cell name="createdon" width="125" />
        </row>
      </grid>

views.name: Quick Find Active Categories
views.fetchxml:
<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical">
        <entity name="cdxmeta_category">
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_categoryid" />
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_categoryname" />
          <attribute name="createdon" />
          <order attribute="cdxmeta_categoryname" descending="false" />
          <filter type="and">
            <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
          </filter>
          <filter type="or" isquickfindfields="1">
            <condition attribute="cdxmeta_categoryname" operator="like" value="{0}" />
          </filter>
        </entity>
      </fetch>
views.layoutxml:
<grid name="resultset" jump="cdxmeta_categoryname" select="1" icon="1" preview="1">
        <row name="result" id="cdxmeta_categoryid">
          <cell name="cdxmeta_categoryname" width="300" />
          <cell name="createdon" width="125" />
        </row>
      </grid>
